raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1268 aims to ensure that the immediate family or guardian of a minor whose death is being investigated by law enforcement will receive information related to the investigation.",
    "The proposed legislation would require law enforcement to provide contact information for the investigative officers involved in the case.",
    "The legislation proposes that families will have access to personal effects of the minor involved in the investigation.",
    "The information provided to families includes the status of the investigation at the discretion of the law enforcement agency.",
    "Failing to communicate openly with victims, especially parents who have lost a child, can exacerbate cycles of trauma in communities."
  ]
}
```
